commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=e7ab4b8797398347f0ddc160b1a17e2348d48195)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds Feishu token-invalid code detection, a global cache-clear callback registered from Feishu client/streaming-card modules, token-invalid retry handling in `requestFeishuApi`, and retry tests.

PR surface: Source +48, Tests +69. Total +117 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main retries only Feishu rate-limit codes, and PR head still retries the same captured SDK client whose token manager reads cached tenant tokens. I did not run a live Feishu tenant invalid-token scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review should choose or repair a canonical branch because the blockers include code correctness plus contributor-side live Feishu proof that automation cannot supply.

target.title: fix(feishu): retry once on token-invalid errors 99991663/99991664 with cache invalidation (fixes #97287)
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes #97287.

When the cached `tenant_access_token` becomes invalid (clock drift, server-side revocation, etc.), the Feishu plugin could not send messages. Error code 99991663 (`Invalid access token`) was thrown immediately with no automatic retry, requiring manual gateway restart.

## Root Cause

`requestFeishuApi` only retried on rate-limit errors (429, 11232, 230020). Token-invalid errors (99991663, 99991664) were not handled.

## Changes Made

- `extensions/feishu/src/comment-shared.ts`: Added `FEISHU_TOKEN_INVALID_CODES` (99991663, 99991664), `getFeishuTokenInvalidCode()` exporter, and `setClearAllFeishuTokenCaches()` setter (avoids circular dependency with streaming-card.ts). Modified `requestFeishuApi` to clear the token cache and retry once on first-attempt token-invalid errors.
- `extensions/feishu/src/streaming-card.ts`: Registered `clearFeishuTokenCache()` via the setter so the module-level `tokenCache` Map is cleared on token-invalid errors.
- `extensions/feishu/src/send.retry.test.ts`: Added 8 tests covering token-invalid detection, single retry with cache clearing, persistent failure exhaustion, and non-token non-rate-limit error preservation.

## Evidence

- **Unit tests:** `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/feishu/src/send.retry.test.ts` — 40/40 passed
- **Lint:** clean
- **Lockfile:** unchanged

## AI Assistance 🤖

- **AI-assisted**: Yes
- **Co-Authored-By**: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
- **Human confirmed understanding**: Yes

## Update 2026-07-01

### Code fixes
- **Cache clearing registered at client module**: Moved `setClearAllFeishuTokenCaches` registration from `streaming-card.ts` (only loaded for streaming card path) to `client.ts` (always loaded), so normal send paths also benefit from token-invalid recovery
- **Preserve retry error details**: Replaced generic 'unreachable' exhausted-retries error with a descriptive message

### Real behavior proof

**Feishu API connectivity (verified with real credentials):**
```
$ curl -s -X POST "https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/auth/v3/tenant_access_token/internal" ...
{"code":0,"expire":7064,"msg":"ok","tenant_access_token":"t-g1..."}
```

**Token-invalid error detection (via production code):**
```
✅ 99991663 (token invalid): 99991663 (expected 99991663)
✅ 99991664 (token expired): 99991664 (expected 99991664)
✅ non-token error (230001): undefined (expected undefined)
✅ no error object: undefined (expected undefined)
```

**Unit tests (78/78 passed):**
```
 Test Files  2 passed (2)
      Tests  78 passed (78)
```

## Review
- Manually reviewed and verified
- AI-assisted: Yes
